children.name: TC-AUTH-004: POST /auth/login/ returns tokens and user
TC-AUTH-005: POST /auth/login/ returns 401 on wrong password
TC-AUTH-003: POST /auth/register/ returns 400 on duplicate email
TC-PROFILE-002: PUT /auth/profile/ updates and returns user
does not log plaintext password in API payload
FLOW 1: Search doctor → Book appointment → See in list
Step 1 (TC-SEARCH-001): patient searches for a doctor
Step 4 (TC-DOC-APPT-001): appointment appears in patient list
Full flow: search → view fee → book → in list
booking then cancellation updates status to CANCELLED
payment initiation returns Chapa checkout URL
payment history loads after payment completes
FLOW 5: Appointment confirmed → Notification → Mark read
notification appears after doctor confirms appointment
full flow: notification arrives then gets marked read
FLOW 4: Book → Reschedule Proposed → Patient Accepts
change request flow updates appointment to new time
applies fee + rating filters together in one search
clearing filters resets all filter state
Step 1 (TC-AUTH-001): register creates account without authenticating
Step 2 (TC-AUTH-004): login authenticates and stores tokens
Step 3 (TC-AUTH-010): app restart restores session via bootstrap
Step 4 (TC-AUTH-011): logout clears all state and tokens
Full flow: all four steps run in sequence correctly
request OTP → reset password → login with new password
session remains active after password change
profile update reflects in auth store without changing role
FLOW 5: TC-AUTH-013 — Doctor switches to linked patient account
switches account and all stores reflect new patient context
FLOW 6: TC-AUTH-010 — Bootstrap with expired token
clears state when refresh token is expired
stores tokens, sets user, and marks authenticated
authenticates user and sets tokens in store

sets error message and does not authenticate

calls register service and clears loading on success
blacklists token, clears store, and removes from SecureStore
still clears local state even if logout API call fails
clears state if no refresh token found

replaces tokens and user on successful switch
merges updated profile while preserving role
calls search API with query and populates doctors
sends min_fee and max_fee params to API
sets empty doctors array without error when no results found
resets all filter state and triggers a new fetch
FLOW 1: Doctor registration → profile setup → pending approval
Step 1 (TC-AUTH-002): doctor logs in with unverified account
Step 2 (TC-DOCTOR-001): doctor fills in profile details
Step 4 (TC-DOCTOR-003): isDoctorVerified returns false before admin approval
Full flow: login → profile → document → still not verified
FLOW 2: Admin approves doctor → full dashboard access
isDoctorVerified becomes true after admin approval
auth store reflects approved doctor user
adds availability rule then deletes it
FLOW 4: Doctor accepts appointment → wallet updated
accepts appointment then fetches updated wallet balance
FLOW 5: Doctor proposes reschedule → patient rejects
rejected change request leaves appointment unchanged
FLOW 6: TC-DOC-APPT-003 — Doctor rejects appointment request
returns empty results for unknown specialization

sets error and does not add appointment when API returns 400
adds new availability rule to store

unpaid appointment has payment_status of unpaid
opens and closes the notifications drawer

marks the notification as read in store
loads doctor availability rules into store

does not call login when both fields are whitespace only
does not call login when password is empty
clears the error field in store
calls refreshToken when a stored refresh token exists
stays logged out when no refresh token is in storage

returns NEW_DOCTOR when profile is incomplete
returns PROFILE_FILLED when profile is complete but no documents
returns DOCUMENT_UPLOADED when documents are pending review

returns false when profile.is_verified is false
